name: Alex Johnson
title: Principal Software Engineer
summary: Principal Software Engineer with 15+ years of full-stack experience and deep specialization in full-stack applications. Built complex React/TypeScript UIs, performant and secure Node.js backend servers, real-time collaboration systems using CRDTs, and AI-integrated visual editors. Capable generalist adept in greenfield projects, end-to-end architecture, Node.js services, AWS infrastructure, and CI/CD automation.
